title: AI Research Intelligence Agent
description: Deep research and analysis automation. One query = comprehensive report with sources, trends, risks, and actionable recommendations. Powered by CrewAI + LLM.

events.eventDescription: Base fee for initializing the research agent and preparing the environment.
Light research: 5 search results + 3 pages analyzed. Best for fast overviews and fact-checking.
Balanced research: 10 search results + 7 pages analyzed. Best for market snapshots and competitor briefs.
Comprehensive research: 20 search results + 15 pages analyzed. Best for due diligence and investment memos.
